name: @restaurant-pos/shared-types
description: Shared TypeScript types for Restaurant POS System

scripts.build: tsc && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && tsc -p tsconfig.esm.json && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/cjs/package.json','{\"type\":\"commonjs\"}')" && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/esm/package.json','{\"type\":\"module\"}')"
